subject: Question about Medicare enrollment
body: I'm turning 65 next month and I'm confused about when I need to sign up for Medicare Part B. Can someone from the office help explain the deadlines? Thank you.

subject: Newsletter unsubscribe
body: Please remove me from this mailing list.

subject: My father is stuck overseas and needs help
body: My father is a Wyoming resident currently traveling in a country where the embassy has been unreachable for two days due to a regional emergency. We need help getting him home as soon as possible. Please call me back today.

subject: Thank you
body: Just wanted to say thanks to the Senator's office for the help with my VA claim last year.

subject: Threat made against the office
body: I am writing to report that someone in my town has been making threatening statements about harming Senator Barrasso at a public event next week. I think someone should look into this immediately.

subject: Support for upcoming energy bill
body: I wanted to share my strong support for the energy legislation currently being discussed. Wyoming families depend on this industry and I hope the Senator continues to back it.

subject: Flooding damage to ranch, need disaster assistance info
body: Our ranch sustained serious flood damage this week and we have livestock at risk. We need to know what federal disaster assistance is available right now, this is time sensitive.

subject: General feedback on town hall
body: I attended the town hall last month and thought it was well organized. A few suggestions for next time: more time for Q&A, and a bigger venue.
